channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead squirrel, 4th April
item.description:
The animal is left on the pavement . There is also take away food waste all over the road . Looks to have been thrown from a car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping clothes, 4th April
item.description:
There is a constant mess coming out of this garden and now it is being left across the road on the pavement, this is not for a bin collection as it's not outside a house it has been flytipped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longville Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old bed and trolley dumped., 4th April
item.description:
Multiple parts of bed for a few days and now a trolley has been added.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayola Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a loose electical wire outside 1 CLifden road, 4th April
item.description:
The loose wire has fallen from one pole and it can easily hit someone as the wind is blowing it all over the pavement, extremely dangerous and could cause a very serious incident

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clifden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Tree needs better support, 4th April
item.description:
Tree support is there but its not doing anything. Needs adjusting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsdown Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped Brunt Ash Road & Dorville Road SE12 8RF, 4th April
item.description:
A white bed mattress dumped on pavement in Burnt Ash Road near Dorville Road SE12 8RF

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 4th April
item.description:
Flytip behind bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped chair, 4th April
item.description:
Flytipped chair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45,47, Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree requires support, 4th April
item.description:
Tree support is broken
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mounthurst Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over floor, 4th April
item.description:
Please can this rubbish strewn all over the floor be removed swiftly?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grummant Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 4th April
item.description:
Mattress flytipped on Elfindale Road, by junction with Herne Hill. Has been there since 2 April.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Elfindale Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolleys causing obstruction, 4th April
item.description:
Two shopping trolleys have been left abandoned at this location. The trolleys making the neighbourhood look untidy. Please could they be removed as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bakery Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaf waste and dead that has been here for months, 4th April
item.description:
This public footpath from Mason Hill to Cromwell Avenue is never swept. Broken glass and other debris along the way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Close, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep hole in Kelvin Rd, close to junction with Bellegrove Rd, 4th April
item.description:
Hole already through tarmac skin, now eroding subsurface foundation. Erosion made worse by vehicles braking for junction and then accelerating away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelvin Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste for removal, 4th April
item.description:
Please remove a load of miscellaneous dumped waste from next to Martock Court.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Consort Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 4th April
item.description:
Please can this dumped mattress be removed swiftly?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture left outside 188 Bellenden Road, 4th April
item.description:
Old drawers and doors have been left outside on the path next to 188 Bellenden Road. They appeared when we got home last night at 11pm and had been added to by this morning but have no changed since. There is no note to say why they are there and we have tried to knock on the neighbours door twice but have been unable to speak to anyone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188, Bellenden Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in oxhawth crescent opposite st James school, 4th April
item.description:
Pothole has been there for at least 3 months and getting bigger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins again, 4th April
item.description:
No explanation needed!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Walk, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on corner, 4th April
item.description:
Someone has started to regularly fly tip on this corner on Spurstowe Road, Marcon place by the tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marcon Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
